creator: henrik@affekt.org
text:
This patch will update the Teamspeak 3 server to the latest version which incorporates bug- and security fixes.

It also adds a dependency on gcc, since the binary is linked against libstdc++, which is not part of the base system anymore, because FreeBSD 10.0 now ships with Clang as the default compiler.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
